scripts.turbo: node scripts/dev-runner.mjs restart && node scripts/dev-runner.mjs status
scripts.turbo:start: node scripts/dev-runner.mjs start && node scripts/dev-runner.mjs status
scripts.turbo:fg: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "python -m uvicorn --app-dir backend app.main:app --reload --reload-dir backend/app --host localhost --port 8001" "npm --prefix frontend run dev -- --host localhost"
